attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
OBJECT_ID as OBJECT_ID,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID as PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
LINE_NUMBER as LINE_NUMBER,
PARENT_ID as QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
LINE_TYPE as LINE_TYPE,
LINE_TYPE_NAME as LINE_TYPE_NAME,
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL as EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL,
EXT_LIST_PRICE as EXT_LIST_PRICE,
QUANTITY as QUANTITY,
FINAL_NET_PRICE as FINAL_NET_PRICE,
PART_NUMBER as PART_NUMBER,
DESCRIPTION as DESCRIPTION,
FULFILLMENT_TYPE as FULFILLMENT_TYPE,
DURATION as DURATION,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC as CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
MLB_INDICATOR as MLB_INDICATOR,
PROMO_DISC as PROMO_DISC,
NONSTANDARD_DISC as NONSTANDARD_DISC,
TRADE_IN_DISC as TRADE_IN_DISC,
MULTI_YEAR_DISC as MULTI_YEAR_DISC,
ACTIVE as ACTIVE,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(CREATED_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as CREATED_DATE,
CREATED_BY as CREATED_BY,
CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(UPDATED_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as UPDATED_DATE,
UPDATED_BY as UPDATED_BY,
WEB_ORDER_ID as WEB_ORDER_ID,
ORDER_STATUS as ORDER_STATUS,
WF_PRICED as WF_PRICED,
SMT_LINE_ID as SMT_LINE_ID_INT,
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER as SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD as EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC as NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT as ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD as TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
OEM_REB_FLAG as OEM_REB_FLAG,
' ' as PROGRAM_ID,
NULL as AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO as ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD as EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
NULL AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
UPDATED_BY_KAFKA as UPDATED_BY_KAFKA,
cast(left (UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,19) as timestamp(0)) as UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
OFFSET_NUMBER as OFFSET_NUMBER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
SOURCE_TYPE as SOURCE_TYPE,
PARTITION_NUMBER as PARTITION_NUMBER,
MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER as MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
COALESCE(ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,'UNKNOWN') as ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
COALESCE(GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,-999.000000) as GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
COALESCE(TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,-999) AS TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(UI_HIDE_FLG,'N') AS UI_HIDE_FLG,
COALESCE(SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999)  AS PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(CHARGE_TYPE_NM,'UNKNOWN') AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
COALESCE(INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999) AS INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999) AS REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(ACTION_TAG_NM,'UNKNOWN')  AS ACTION_TAG_NM,
COALESCE(AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,-999) AS AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(BILLING_MODEL_NM,-999) AS  BILLING_MODEL_NM,
COALESCE(PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT, -999) AS PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(RATE_TABLE_NM,'UNKNOWN') AS RATE_TABLE_NM,
COALESCE(RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,'UNKNOWN') AS RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
COALESCE(SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
COALESCE(CAST( CAST( SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DATE '3500-01-01') AS SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
COALESCE(CAST( CAST( SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DATE '3500-01-01') AS SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
COALESCE(UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
COALESCE(USAGE_QTY,-999) AS USAGE_QTY,
COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,-999.0000000) AS SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(CAST( CAST( REQUESTED_START_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DATE '1900-01-01') AS REQUESTED_START_DATE,
COALESCE(CAST( CAST( REQUESTED_END_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DATE '3500-01-01') AS REQUESTED_END_DATE,
COALESCE(MAGIC_KEY, 'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY, 
COALESCE(MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST ,-999.0000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,
COALESCE(AI_INTENT, 'UNKNOWN') as AI_INTENT,	
COALESCE(PRODUCT_STRATEGY_VALUE, 'UNKNOWN') as PRODUCT_STRATEGY_VALUE,
COALESCE(PRODUCT_STRATEGY_CLASS, 'UNKNOWN') as PRODUCT_STRATEGY_CLASS,
COALESCE(STRATEGIC_FACTOR, 1.000000) as STRATEGIC_FACTOR,
COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID, 'UNKNOWN') as SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID /*CCW AUG 2025 Release  */
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QOT_LN_VW_KFK_FF ST
 /* ADDED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL */
 Where NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_KFKA EL
WHERE ST.OBJECT_ID = EL.OBJECT_ID
--WHERE ST.PARENT_ID = EL.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID /* CCW AUG 2025 Release */
AND ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER = EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER
)
